description: Editable prompt library for the local Life OS Prompt Launcher.

departments.label: Life Logistics HQ / Chief of Staff Penny
Chief of Finance Penny / Finance Benefits HQ
Office Leaks VP Penny / Office Leaks Consulting HQ

prompts.title: Quick Boot
prompts.description: Short department boot command for a fast GitHub sync.

prompts.title: Full Department Boot
prompts.description: Complete read-only department boot prompt with global and project-specific instructions.
prompts.template:
/BOOT @GitHub

You are {department}.

Repository:
{repository}

Follow the canonical global boot sequence beginning with:

memory/STARTUP_BOOT.md

Read all required global boot files in order.

Then continue into this department's project boot files:

{project_boot_files}

Read the Advisory Index and the relevant source board only when advisory routing, consumption, creation, or reconciliation is relevant.

Operate read-only unless I explicitly authorize GitHub modifications.

After boot, provide a concise {report_name} synchronization report covering role and responsibilities, current state, active tracks, open loops, synchronization drift, and recommendations.
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Create or Draft Advisory
prompts.description: Create a formal advisory draft or send one when explicitly instructed.

prompts.title: Advise
prompts.description: Request a recommendation without creating a durable advisory.
prompts.template:
/ADVISE
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Sync Advisory
prompts.description: Read advisory state and identify drift without changing it.

prompts.title: Human Rewrite
prompts.description: Rewrite in natural, conversational language.
prompts.template:
/HUMAN
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Explain Simply
prompts.description: Use plain language and one helpful analogy.
prompts.template:
/ELI10
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Deeper Analysis
prompts.description: Test assumptions and provide a stronger answer.
prompts.template:
/DEEPER
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Challenge Me
prompts.description: Challenge reflexive agreement and provide the strongest counterargument.
prompts.template:
/NOYES
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Give Three Options
prompts.description: Request three genuinely distinct options.
prompts.template:
/GIVE3
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Make a Table
prompts.description: Turn comparisons or repeated fields into a clean table.
prompts.template:
/TABLE
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Tighten
prompts.description: Make the previous answer sharper and shorter.
prompts.template:
/TIGHTEN
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Flood Ideas
prompts.description: Brainstorm broadly and label risk or low-confidence ideas.
prompts.template:
/FLOOD
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Make Steps
prompts.description: Turn the response into an immediately usable numbered checklist.
prompts.template:
/STEPS
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Red Pen
prompts.description: Fix grammar, clarity, awkward phrasing, and concision.
prompts.template:
/REDPEN
{custom_block}

prompts.title: Daily Itinerary
prompts.description: Build a practical day plan from Todoist, Calendar, overdue work, and priorities.

prompts.title: Update Todoist
prompts.description: Prepare or perform an authorized Todoist update and report exactly what changed.

prompts.title: Morning Sync
prompts.description: Boot the selected department and produce its morning synchronization report.

prompts.title: Nightly Sync
prompts.description: Perform a read-only end-of-day synchronization and identify unfinished loops.

prompts.title: Review Open Loops
prompts.description: Review durable open loops and recommend the next actions.

prompts.title: Capture Thought
prompts.description: Route a raw thought to the correct durable or working location.

prompts.title: Drive Work
prompts.description: Prepare a focused Google Drive discovery, creation, or edit request.

prompts.title: Calendar Work
prompts.description: Prepare a focused Google Calendar review or scheduling request.

prompts.title: Gmail Work
prompts.description: Search Gmail, summarize evidence, and extract follow-up actions.
